title: Make AuthFailed error message actionable
description: client_task.rs bootstrap_session() reports 'Authentication failed (HTTP {code})' when the server returns an auth error. This tells the user what happened but not what to do. A first-time user who mistyped their token will stare at this with no guidance. The message should suggest a remediation, e.g.: 'Authentication failed (HTTP {code}) — check --bearer-token or --basic-user/--basic-pass and restart'. Similarly the config.rs error '--bearer-token and --ca-cert cannot be used together; CustomCaAuth does not support injecting an Authorization header' is explanatory but does not say what the user *should* do instead (use no-auth with custom CA, or bearer without custom CA).
close_reason: Already implemented: auth error message includes actionable flag hints
